title: How to Create Your First AI Sales Campaign in Minutes (Full Demo)
description:
Create your first AI sales campaign for FREE:
https://infinitxai.com/free/dfy-campaign-builder

In this video, I walk you through the entire process of building an AI powered sales campaign from scratch using the IX system. You will see how to set up your campaign, train your AI agent, generate outreach messages, upload contacts, and launch. Then I run a live demo showing the AI handling text conversations and a voice call that books an appointment automatically.

No coding. No complex tools. Just talk to the AI and it builds everything for you.
